_note: Refreshed by the refresh-sports-feed scheduled task. Each item is {headline, url, source, published (ISO8601), snark}. Snark voice: Barstool-adjacent guy-at-the-bar, crass, horny, cocky, zero filler. One sentence. No slurs, no punching down at specific real people in a harmful way. Punch sideways (at media, front offices, rival fanbases) and up (at ownership). Keep it Boston.

items.headline: Brayan Bello gets shelled again without opener, gives up 7 runs to Braves
items.snark: Sox finally let Bello pitch without training wheels and he immediately turns into a batting practice machine.

items.headline: Chad Tracy has 'preliminary' talks with Marcelo Mayer about position change
items.snark: Former top pick getting the utility man treatment because Trevor Story's groin is more reliable than his glove.

items.headline: Bleacher Report floats Sonny Gray as potential trade deadline seller candidate
items.snark: Sox might flip their best starter two months in because this team plays baseball like they owe money to the Braves.

items.headline: Patriots schedule analysis: Super Bowl rematch opener, Germany trip highlight 2026 slate
items.snark: Pats open in Seattle for revenge tour, but nobody tell them the Seahawks hung a banner for beating us.

items.headline: Patriots rookie Quintayvious Hutchins charged with domestic assault misdemeanor
items.snark: Draft pick already in legal trouble before training camp, which is speedrunning the Patriots controversy cycle.
